_doc: Sentinel workspace registry — SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for cadence, depth, routing, and reporting across ClickUp / Slack / Gmail. Edit this file (in VS Code with Claude), then run infra/sync-workspaces.py to mirror it into the Postgres `workspaces` table that Chat/SQL read. Consumed by: daily-briefing collector, weekly SP report, issue-router, chat gather.
_cadence_values: daily = every briefing | weekly-fri = Friday AM block | weekly-mon = Monday block | mute = not reported
_depth_values: deep = tasks + who + progress + new comments + hygiene | track = movement summary + my items | summary = counts + headlines | none
_escalation: Any item in a weekly/mute space still surfaces in the DAILY report when it matches an escalation rule: priority in (urgent,high) OR overdue OR blocker keyword (blocked|blocker|escalate|risk|delay|stuck) OR Cem mentioned/assigned.

spaces.name: Development
spaces.readme: Where the dev teams (Machine Learning, Hardware, Firmware, Backend, Software) do the work, on a sprint board. DAILY: who is on what, real progress, NEW task comments since yesterday, blockers. 'Review' status = implemented & in final check → count it as completed/near-complete. WEEKLY (Fri): completed issues + completed story points per person. Flag when the board doesn't reflect reality (in-progress tasks with no recent comment, tasks missing story points, nothing reaching Review).

spaces.name: Management
spaces.readme: Where Baran and Cem make plans and raise high-level management issues. DAILY: track what moves here. This is the DEFAULT home for issues Cem creates unless he names another project or context clearly points elsewhere — if still ambiguous, ASK Cem before creating.

spaces.name: Sales / Marketing / PH & Ops
spaces.readme: Sales team work PLUS ongoing field deployments by the postharvest & operations teams. WEEKLY (Fri AM) summary in the daily report. Escalate to DAILY only when critical (urgent/high priority, overdue, blocker keyword, or Cem mentioned) — e.g. a failed field deployment or a customer-blocking issue.

spaces.name: Team Leads
spaces.readme: Weekly cross-team sync board (team leads gather each week to sync between teams). WEEKLY (Fri AM) summary. Escalate to DAILY only when critical. Note: this board typically has NO story points.

spaces.name: Fundraising
spaces.readme: Baran adds fundraising issues here. WEEKLY (Fri AM) summary. Escalate to DAILY only when critical (e.g. an investor deadline, a term-sheet action on Cem).

spaces.name: Admin
spaces.readme: Administrative/back-office space. Not in the regular report. Surfaces only via critical escalation. (Cem did not request reporting on this — adjust cadence if that changes.)

spaces.name: Management
spaces.readme: GOHM org's live hub — Management space, which holds GOHM's sprint folder (90151692710). This is where GOHM work actually flows right now. DAILY progress update. Robust6G coordination + incoming Q-TRUST6G land here.

spaces.name: Development
spaces.readme: DIEFI — an EU project of GOHM, its own ClickUp team with a single Development space that holds the DIEFI sprint folder (90145177889). This is the active GOHM-side board (~28 tasks/30d). DAILY progress update. Cem leads this; deliverable deadlines matter.

spaces.name: gohm-diefi
spaces.readme: GOHM-side DIEFI space (lives in the GOHM ClickUp team, NOT the DIEFI team — API queries must go through team 42085420). Created ~Jul 2026 with its own Sprint Folder (901516610795); still empty. DAILY track once work lands. Note the DIEFI team's own Development space (90143023495) remains the primary DIEFI board.

spaces.name: Villa Kurt Development
spaces.readme: Development side of Cem's personal Villa Kurt project (split out from the villakurt space). Created ~Jul 2026 with its own Sprint Folder (901516610863); still empty. Reported under Personal / Smart Home alongside villakurt.

spaces.name: villakurt
spaces.readme: Cem's personal villakurt space (Loxone Miniserver smart-home + house renovation + Home Assistant at home.villakurt.eu). Has a biweekly sprint folder (90151882929); current sprint is 'Sprint 13' (15-30 Jun 2026). Reported under Personal / Smart Home.

slack._draft: AUTO-DRAFTED by Sentinel from known channel names — CEM PLEASE CORRECT the tier/org/team of any wrong row. Channels the bot joins that are NOT listed here default to {tier: daily}. Set tier=weekly-fri to move a channel into the Friday block; tier=mute to silence (still escalates on alarm keywords).

gmail._draft: AUTO-DRAFTED heuristics — CEM PLEASE CONFIRM. Default = daily triage (current behavior, unchanged). 'weekly_senders' are surfaced only in the Friday block unless they hit an escalation rule. Accounts: ca@freshsens.ai (freshsens), cem.ayyildiz@gohm.tech (gohm).
